_meta.review_notes: Overall very solid interpretations and protocol suggestions. SNS Switch is not clearly implicated — more of a vagus nerve pattern. Cell Synergy always 1 scoop. Day 1 = in-office testing only. Don't recommend Vitamin D or Integra Cell until labs confirm.

corrections.sns_switch: Not clearly implicated — more vagus nerve pattern. Do not trigger SNS Balance unless SNS is clearly switched.
corrections.supplement_phasing: Day 1 = in-office testing only. Do not recommend lab-dependent supplements without labs.
corrections.vagus_protocol_order: Vagus Support first, then Vagus Trauma if insufficient
corrections.cyto_lower_gate: Must address Leptin first (Biotoxin + Leptin Resist + Adipothin + diet), THEN MSH

cytolower_gate_reason: VCS 3/32; must address Leptin before MSH
